message:
✨ Share version-check state, auto-scroll to updates, show commit list (#1293)

- Convert useVersionCheck to shared Context so UpdateIndicator and
  UpdateSettings share one state instance (fixes indicator not showing)
- Navigate to settings#system-updates-settings for auto-scroll
- Add commit list between current and latest SHA via GitHub Compare API
- Rename useVersionCheck.ts → .tsx to support JSX in provider

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

@@ -694,3 +700,50 @@ function PrereqRow({
) } + +/** Collapsible list of recent commits between current and latest SHA */ +function CommitList({ commits }: { commits: Array<{ sha: string; message: string; author: string; date: string }> }) { + const { t } = useTranslation() + const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false) + + return ( +
+ + {expanded && ( +
+ {commits.map((commit) => ( +
+ {commit.sha.slice(0, 7)} +
+

{commit.message}

{commit.author} · {formatCommitDate(commit.date)}

+

+ ))} +
+ )} +
+ ) +} + +/** Format ISO date to relative time for commit display */ +function formatCommitDate(iso: string): string { + const date = new Date(iso) + const now = Date.now() + const diff = now - date.getTime() + if (diff < 3600000) return `${Math.floor(diff / 60000)}m ago` + if (diff < 86400000) return `${Math.floor(diff / 3600000)}h ago` + if (diff < 604800000) return `${Math.floor(diff / 86400000)}d ago` + return date.toLocaleDateString() +}
